summary: Frontend-only static UI screen tested via Playwright at 375x667 mobile viewport. All 10 listed checks PASS: the screen mounts at '/', purple-gradient header renders with title 'My Tickets' and back chevron, ticket id 'AC-25874' and 'High Priority' pill render, all 7 timeline steps render in order with correct titles and times (Ticket Created 10:33 AM, Assigned to Technician 10:34 AM, Technician Accepted 10:35 AM, On The Way 10:50 AM, Reached 11:05 AM, Work In Progress 11:10 AM, Completed 11:45 AM), step 2 shows 'Ramesh Kumar' with assigned-call-btn / assigned-chat-btn, step 4 shows view-on-map-btn, the WIP card is expanded by default with 'AC Service In Progress' title, the 'Our technician is currently diagnosing' description, all 4 activity rows (Indoor Unit Inspection Completed, Filter Cleaning Completed, Gas Pressure Check InProgress, Cooling Performance Test Pending), eta-box with 'Estimated Completion / 35 Minutes Remaining', and all three bottom buttons (wip-call-technician-btn, wip-chat-btn, wip-view-photos-btn). Tapping wip-call-technician-btn renders the toast with message 'Calling technician'; other taps (assigned-call -> 'Calling Ramesh Kumar', view-on-map -> 'Opening map', header-back -> 'Back') also surface the correct toast. No console errors during render. Only a minor non-blocking React Native Web deprecation warning was observed: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' — originates from the active step circle shadow styles in TimelineStep.tsx.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Originates from circleActive style (shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius). Reference: /app/frontend/src/components/tickets/TimelineStep.tsx:184-189. Non-blocking on native (shadow* still preferred for iOS); only a warning on web. Optional: gate web-specific boxShadow via Platform.select.

action_items: Optional polish: silence the RN Web 'shadow*' deprecation warning in TimelineStep.tsx by using Platform.select to provide boxShadow on web while keeping shadow* for iOS/Android. Not required for native shipping.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured: components split per concern (ScreenHeader, Pill, TimelineStep, WorkInProgressContent), constants centralised in colors/typography/mockData, no hardcoded URLs, all text wrapped in <Text>, all interactive elements have testID, styles via StyleSheet.create. No deprecated Expo packages detected (expo-linear-gradient, @expo/vector-icons, react-native-safe-area-context all current).

Toast component intentionally stays mounted (component-level conditional render only resets when toast state changes); current implementation only sets state once and animates opacity, so the testID node remains in the tree after auto-fade. This matches the agent-to-agent context note and does not affect functional correctness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static screen, no backend, no EXPO_BACKEND_URL needed. Use EXPO_PACKAGER_PROXY_URL from /app/frontend/.env. To view the WIP card, scroll inside the inner [data-testid='ticket-scroll'] element via element.scrollTop=800 — the outer page does not scroll because the ScrollView is height-constrained by SafeAreaView. Toast stays mounted after fade (opacity-animated only); validate by reading text within ~300ms of the tap.
